message:
Command `# MASSIVE PROGRESS! 
# Steps 26-30 visible: STA mid-PnR, RepairDesignPostGPL, ManualGlobalPlacement, 
# DetailedPlacement, and STA-mid-PnR-1!
# GRT-0097 warning is benign (no routing yet at this stage)
# Let's check the overall flow position
sleep 300
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ENDED"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/ 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -8
tail -5 /tmp/pnr_v4.log` executed with exit code 0.
